name: ntnkit
description: Satellite-ready application layer for NTN and NTN-IoT
author: Hossein Yavari

scripts.build: pnpm clean && pnpm --filter @ntnkit/core run build && pnpm --filter @ntnkit/sdk --filter @ntnkit/scan run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @ntnkit/core run typecheck && pnpm --filter @ntnkit/core run build && pnpm --filter @ntnkit/sdk --filter @ntnkit/scan run typecheck
